---
title: "SYoS panel discussion and workshop no 7 with NAIF participation"
date: 2026-09-16
author: "ETH Library and University of Bern"
author-title: "Organizer"
description: "Join the SYoS panel discussion on responsible research assessment on 16 September 2026 and SYoS Workshop no 7 on quantitative scientometric indicators in Bern on 17 September 2026."
categories:
  - "Participation by NAIF"
tags:
  - "SYoS"
  - "Workshop"
  - "Research assessment"
proofread: false
image: "images/keyvisual-syos-eth-banner.png"
image-alt: "Swiss Year of Scientometrics key visual with SYoS lettering"
image-caption: "Swiss Year of Scientometrics key visual. Source: [Swiss Year of Scientometrics (SYoS)](https://yearofscientometrics.ethz.ch/). Rights: ETH Library."
toc: true
---

<!-- Sources: email invitation from Annette Guignard on behalf of the organising team; https://yearofscientometrics.ethz.ch/mc-events/syos-panel-discussion/; and https://yearofscientometrics.ethz.ch/mc-events/syos-workshop-no-7/ -->

## Details

- Date: Wednesday, 16 September 2026 to Thursday, 17 September 2026
- Location: Bern, Switzerland
- Registration: [Panel discussion registration](https://forms.microsoft.com/e/k131W3kRWY) by 2 September 2026; [workshop registration by email](mailto:syos@library.ethz.ch?subject=Registration%20for%20SYoS%20Workshop%20on%2017%20September%202026%2C%209%3A00-15%3A00%2C%20at%20University%20of%20Bern&body=Hello%2C%0A%0AI%20would%20like%20to%20register%20for%20the%20SYoS%20Workshop.%0A%0AFirst%20name%20%28required%29%3A%20%0ALast%20name%20%28required%29%3A%20%0AAffiliation%20%2F%20Institution%20%28required%29%3A%20%0APosition%20%2F%20Role%20%28optional%29%3A%20%0AEmail%20address%20%28required%29%3A) by 30 August 2026
- Event pages: [SYoS panel discussion](https://yearofscientometrics.ethz.ch/mc-events/syos-panel-discussion/) and [SYoS Workshop no 7](https://yearofscientometrics.ethz.ch/mc-events/syos-workshop-no-7/)

## Programme

- Panel discussion: Wednesday, 16 September 2026, 17:00-18:30, Felix Frey Auditorium, Freiburgstrasse 3, 3010 Bern
- Workshop: Thursday, 17 September 2026, 09:00-15:00, Main Building, University of Bern, Hochschulstrasse 4, 3012 Bern

## Panel discussion

The panel asks: **How can research performance be assessed in a fair, transparent, and responsible way?**

As research evaluation practices evolve, universities, research institutions, and funding organisations face increasing demands to balance accountability, quality, and the recognition of diverse research contributions.

The panel brings together experts from bibliometrics, research management, funding organisations, and academia to discuss key challenges in responsible research assessment. Topics include the role of quantitative indicators and peer review, disciplinary and institutional differences, and the recognition of contributions such as Open Science, knowledge transfer, teaching, team science, and interdisciplinary collaboration.

The event aims to foster dialogue, highlight key trade-offs, and explore balanced approaches to research assessment that reflect the diversity and values of contemporary research.

## Workshop no 7

SYoS Workshop no 7 is jointly organised by the ETH Library and the University of Bern. During the workshop, results from a survey conducted within the NAIF project will be presented and discussed. As part of Track 1, the study examined whether and to what extent Swiss higher education institutions use quantitative scientometric indicators (QSIs) in recruitment processes, evaluations, and institutional management.

The aim is to develop a shared understanding of the findings and to explore their implications for the Swiss higher education landscape. Participants will draw potential conclusions and formulate recommendations on the responsible use of QSIs in research assessment and university governance.
